title: Describe Daily Routines
prompt: Describe your daily routine from morning until night in simple English.
hint: Use time expressions like 'in the morning', 'after lunch', and verbs like 'wake up', 'eat', 'clean'.
sample: Every morning I wake up early, brush my teeth, and eat breakfast. In the afternoon, I go to the supermarket. At night, I relax and go to bed.

ja.prompt: 朝から夜までのあなたの日課を簡単な英語で説明してください。
ja.hint: 「in the morning」「after lunch」などの時間表現や「wake up」「eat」「clean」などの動詞を使いましょう。
ja.sample: Every morning I wake up early, brush my teeth, and eat breakfast. In the afternoon, I go to the supermarket. At night, I relax and go to bed.

zh.prompt: 用簡單的英文描述你從早到晚的日常生活。
zh.hint: 使用時間表達如 'in the morning'、'after lunch'，以及動詞如 'wake up'、'eat'、'clean'。
zh.sample: Every morning I wake up early, brush my teeth, and eat breakfast. In the afternoon, I go to the supermarket. At night, I relax and go to bed.

title: Talk About Family Activities
prompt: Talk about activities you do with your family during the day.
hint: Mention activities like eating meals together, doing homework, or watching TV.
sample: In the evening, my family and I watch a funny cartoon and laugh together.

ja.prompt: 日中に家族と一緒にする活動について話してください。
ja.hint: 一緒に食事をする、宿題をする、テレビを見るなどの活動を言いましょう。
ja.sample: In the evening, my family and I watch a funny cartoon and laugh together.

zh.prompt: 談談你和家人在一天中一起做的活動。
zh.hint: 提到一起吃飯、做功課或看電視等活動。
zh.sample: In the evening, my family and I watch a funny cartoon and laugh together.

title: Use New Vocabulary Words
prompt: Use the new vocabulary words from the story in sentences.
sample: She gently wakes up her children. I wipe the table after breakfast. We relax together in the evening.

ja.prompt: 物語の新しい単語を使って文を作ってください。
ja.hint: 「gently」「wipe」「sweep」「groceries」「treat」「relax」「tidy」「peaceful」などの単語を使いましょう。
ja.sample: She gently wakes up her children. I wipe the table after breakfast. We relax together in the evening.

zh.prompt: 用故事中的新單字造句。
zh.sample: She gently wakes up her children. I wipe the table after breakfast. We relax together in the evening.

title: Shadowing Practice
prompt: Listen to the story and repeat each sentence aloud to practice pronunciation and rhythm.
hint: Try to copy the speaker's tone, speed, and intonation as closely as possible.
sample: My name is Helena and I am a mother of two children.

ja.prompt: 物語を聞いて、発音とリズムの練習のために一文ずつ声に出して繰り返してください。
ja.hint: 話者のトーン、速度、イントネーションをできるだけ真似しましょう。
ja.sample: My name is Helena and I am a mother of two children.

zh.prompt: 聽故事並大聲重複每句話，練習發音和節奏。
zh.hint: 盡量模仿說話者的語調、速度和語氣。
zh.sample: My name is Helena and I am a mother of two children.
